generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion of the gantry crane hoist"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for the gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of the cart stepper motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorPositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures position of the hoist stepper motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorPositionSensor
]

instance HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorPositionSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurements from the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler, PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurements from the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler, PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance CartMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data of the cart stepper motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler, PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance HoistMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position data of the hoist stepper motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerEnabler, PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane structure created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment of TimescaleDB, Grafana, and Eclipse Mosquitto services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService, DashboardService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for control and logging of gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino for hardware interfacing of sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService, TimescaleDBService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling of the crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance C4ModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization of the digital twin system"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, DashboardService
]

instance TimescaleDBService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB for sensor and motor position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization via Grafana dashboard for operator monitoring and fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic models for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight, MoveCartAction, MoveHoistAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of crane dynamics for operational improvements"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real measurements against simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for inter-service communication using Eclipse Mosquitto"
    DTDFVocab:provides InterServiceCommunicationInsight
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of time-series data for analysis and validation"
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane system parameters via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time fault alerts when validation thresholds are breached"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory recommendations for crane movement to minimize swing and improve efficiency"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based insights for planning and operational improvements without direct physical control"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation metrics comparing real measurements against simulations"
]

instance InterServiceCommunicationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication between services for data exchange"
]

instance MoveCartAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement along the gantry crane track based on trajectory recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MoveHoistAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Controls hoist vertical movement based on trajectory recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActivateElectromagnetAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activates electromagnet to pick up containers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement along the gantry crane track using TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoist vertical movement using TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up and releases containers using magnetic force controlled by Arduino"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by harbor cranes in the Port of Antwerp"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, CartMotorPositionSensor, HoistMotorPositionSensor, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, TimescaleDBService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the Control Application, which interfaces with the physical crane's motor controllers to execute movement paths with minimal residual swing."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous synchronization with data logged and validated as events occur. Trajectory execution and validation occur during operation with immediate feedback loops for error detection and correction, ensuring near-instantaneous data flow between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized constellation where physical components (crane, controllers, sensors) interact with digital services via MQTT broker and TimescaleDB. The system is deployed on a single personal computer with Docker containers for database, dashboard, and MQTT broker, and Python applications for control, logging, and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates during the 'as operated' lifecycle phase, continuously monitoring and validating the physical crane during real-world operations to support fault detection, trajectory optimization, and continuous validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation using distance metrics between real-time sensor data and simulation outputs; thresholds for acceptable deviation trigger alerts. Model validation techniques from [5] are applied to ensure fidelity, with error thresholds monitored via Grafana dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (via Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time data exchange between physical interface, control applications, and digital services. Data flows from physical sensors to MQTT topics, then to database and other services."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a single personal computer using Docker containers for TimescaleDB, Grafana, and Eclipse Mosquitto; Python applications (gantrylib module) for control, logging, and HMI; installed via pip and managed via docker-compose."
]
